description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a sleek, minimalist design, upholstered in a solid black material. The seat and backrest are divided into a grid of square, tufted cushions, giving it a contemporary, geometric appearance. The armrests are straight, boxy, and extend to the same height as the backrest, providing a uniform silhouette. The sofa is supported by two visible, metal sled-style legs positioned near the ends, which add a touch of industrial style and elevate the piece off the ground. The upholstery appears smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting a faux leather or vinyl finish. This sofa would be well-suited for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern outdoor lounges.
description: A sleek, black, modern sofa with square tufted cushions, straight armrests, and metal sled legs, featuring a smooth, slightly glossy finish.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the straight, continuous backrest and the two metal sled legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the boxy armrest, the sofa's depth, and the uniform height of the backrest and armrest.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the grid of square, tufted seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and metal sled legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and profile seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Six square seat cushions and six matching square back cushions, all attached and uniformly sized, arranged in a grid pattern with visible tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a solid, padded appearance and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Two metal sled legs, one near each end, with a flat, rectangular profile and a chrome finish, exposed and slightly inset from the sofa's corners.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest at medium height, segmented visually by square tufted cushions, matching the seat in design.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black upholstery with a geometric, tufted grid pattern; smooth surface with visible seams outlining each square cushion.
